seed.title: Seed
seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation.

audio.title: Audio
audio.description: Whether to generate audio synchronized with the video (dialogue and sound effects).

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Text prompt for video generation. Maximum 5000 characters.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds.

end_image.title: End Image
end_image.description: End frame image for the video. Must be used together with start_image for start-end-to-video mode. The aspect ratios of start and end images must be similar (ratio between 0.8 and 1.25). Supported formats: png, jpeg, jpg, webp.

start_image.title: Start Image
start_image.description: Start frame image for the video. When provided without an end_image, the model runs in image-to-video mode. Supported formats: png, jpeg, jpg, webp.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the output video. Only used in text-to-video mode (ignored when images are provided).
